-spec solve(list(str()), list(str()), list(boolean())) -> list(str()).

solve(Code, BusinessLine, IsActive) ->
    AllowedBusiness = ["electronics", "grocery", "pharmacy", "restaurant"],
    Valid = [ {C, BL} || {C, BL, A} <- lists:zip3(Code, BusinessLine, IsActive),
                          C /= "",
                          re:run(C, <<"^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$">>, [unicode]) == {match, _},
                          lists:member(BL, AllowedBusiness),
                          A == true ],
    Sorted = lists:sort(
        fun(A, B) ->
            BL_A = element(2, A),
            BL_B = element(2, B),
            IndexA = find_index(BL_A, AllowedBusiness),
            IndexB = find_index(BL_B, AllowedBusiness),
            case {IndexA, IndexB} of
                {Ia, Ib} ->
                    if
                        Ia < Ib -> -1;
                        Ia > Ib -> 1;
                        true -> lists:cmp(element(1, A), element(1, B))
                    end
            end
        end,
        Valid
    ),
    [ element(1, Item) || Item <- Sorted ].

find_index(BL, List) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun(Item, Acc) ->
            case Acc of
                undefined ->
                    case Item of
                        BL -> 0;
                        _ -> undefined
                    end;
                I ->
                    case Item of
                        BL -> I + 1;
                        _ -> Acc
                    end
            end
        end,
        undefined,
        List
    ).
